Aaha, yevano oruthan kooppudran, athu naan illa.
Padippu mattum thaan unkitta irunthu eduka mudiyathu.
Veeram na enna nu theriyuma? Bayam illatha mathiri nadikrathu.
Naan unna virumbala, un mela aasa padala... aana athu ellam nadanthudum nu bayama irukku.
Naan romba nallavan da, aana romba kettavan.
Appa, oru bullet vaangi thanga pa.
Nee panra thappa kooda getha panra.
